You are an LLVM maintainer.
Users have reported a case where LLVM failed to optimize a specific program.
You are adding new code or modifying existing code to implement the missing optimization.
## Instructions for Fixing ##

Your response is for a formal code review and MUST strictly follow the structure below. Use the exact Markdown headings provided.

---

### 1. Analyze
**Content**: Provide a deep analysis of the missed optimization. Explain the "what" (what is the issue), the "why" (why does it happen in the current code), and the "impact" (what is the performance or correctness impact).

### 2. Propose a Patch
**Content**: Describe your proposed changes at a conceptual level. Explain the logic behind your fix and why it is the correct approach according to LLVM's coding standards.

### 3. Verify
**Content**: Walk through the execution of the provided test program with your patch applied. Explain how the new code path handles the case correctly and achieves the desired optimization.

### 4. Submit
**Content**: Provide the complete and final source code for the file that needs to be changed.
*   The code must be a single, self-contained block.
*   The code must be the full file content, not a diff or a snippet.
*   Enclose the code within a ```cpp ... ``` Markdown block.

---

Here is another failed to optimize program:
The source program is:
```llvm
target datalayout = "e-p:64:64:64-i1:8:8-i8:8:8-i16:16:16-i32:32:32-i64:64:64-f32:32:32-f64:64:64-v64:64:64-v128:128:128-a0:0:64-s0:64:64-f80:128:128-n8:16:32:64"
target triple = "x86_64-pc-linux-gnu"

define i32 @test_pr30188a(i1 zeroext %flag, i32 %x) {
entry:
  %y = alloca i32, align 4
  %z = alloca i32, align 4
  br i1 %flag, label %if.then, label %if.else

if.then:                                          ; preds = %entry
  call void @g()
  %one = load i32, ptr %y, align 4
  %two = add i32 %one, 2
  store i32 %two, ptr %y, align 4
  br label %if.end

if.else:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %three = load i32, ptr %z, align 4
  %four = add i32 %three, 2
  store i32 %four, ptr %y, align 4
  br label %if.end

if.end:                                           ; preds = %if.else, %if.then
  ret i32 1
}

declare void @g()

!llvm.module.flags = !{!0, !1}
!llvm.dbg.cu = !{!2}

!0 = !{i32 2, !"Dwarf Version", i32 4}
!1 = !{i32 2, !"Debug Info Version", i32 3}
!2 = distinct !DICompileUnit(language: DW_LANG_C99, file: !3, isOptimized: false, runtimeVersion: 0, emissionKind: NoDebug)
!3 = !DIFile(filename: "a.c", directory: "a/b")

```

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64:64-i1:8:8-i8:8:8-i16:16:16-i32:32:32-i64:64:64-f32:32:32-f64:64:64-v64:64:64-v128:128:128-a0:0:64-s0:64:64-f80:128:128-n8:16:32:64"
target triple = "x86_64-pc-linux-gnu"

define zeroext i1 @test_pr30244(i1 zeroext %flag, i1 zeroext %flag2, i32 %blksA, i32 %blksB, i32 %nblks) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @test_pr30244(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[P:%.*]] = alloca i8, align 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[FLAG:%.*]], label [[IF_THEN:%.*]], label [[IF_ELSE:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.then:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp uge i32 [[BLKSA:%.*]], [[NBLKS:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END_SINK_SPLIT:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.else:
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[FLAG2:%.*]], label [[IF_THEN2:%.*]], label [[IF_END:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.then2:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add i32 [[NBLKS]], [[BLKSB:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = icmp ule i32 [[ADD]], [[BLKSA]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END_SINK_SPLIT]]
; CHECK:       if.end.sink.split:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2_SINK:%.*]] = phi i1 [ [[CMP2]], [[IF_THEN2]] ], [ [[CMP]], [[IF_THEN]] ]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[FROMBOOL3:%.*]] = zext i1 [[CMP2_SINK]] to i8
; CHECK-NEXT:    store i8 [[FROMBOOL3]], ptr [[P]], align 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END]]
; CHECK:       if.end:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 true
entry:
  %p = alloca i8, align 1
  br i1 %flag, label %if.then, label %if.else

if.then:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %blksA, %nblks
  %frombool1 = zext i1 %cmp to i8
  store i8 %frombool1, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

if.else:                                          ; preds = %entry
  br i1 %flag2, label %if.then2, label %if.end

if.then2:                                         ; preds = %if.else
  %add = add i32 %nblks, %blksB
  %cmp2 = icmp ule i32 %add, %blksA
  %frombool3 = zext i1 %cmp2 to i8
  store i8 %frombool3, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

if.end:                                           ; preds = %if.then2, %if.else, %if.then
  ret i1 true
}

----------------------------------------
define i1 @test_pr30244(i1 zeroext %flag, i1 zeroext %flag2, i32 %blksA, i32 %blksB, i32 %nblks) zeroext {
entry:
  %p = alloca i64 1, align 1
  br i1 zeroext %flag, label %if.then, label %if.else

if.else:
  br i1 zeroext %flag2, label %if.then2, label %if.end

if.then2:
  %add = add i32 %nblks, %blksB
  %cmp2 = icmp ule i32 %add, %blksA
  %frombool3 = zext i1 %cmp2 to i8
  store i8 %frombool3, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

if.then:
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %blksA, %nblks
  %frombool1 = zext i1 %cmp to i8
  store i8 %frombool1, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

if.end:
  ret i1 1
}

if.end:

}

check_fast_log.body:
target datalayout = "e-p:64:64:64-i1:8:8-i8:8:8-i16:16:16-i32:32:32-i64:64:64-f32:32:32-f64:64:64-v64:64:64-v128:128:128-a0:0:64-s0:64:64-f80:128:128-n8:16:32:64"
target triple = "x86_64-pc-linux-gnu"

define zeroext i1 @test_pr30244(i1 zeroext %flag, i1 zeroext %flag2, i32 %blksA, i32 %blksB, i32 %nblks) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @test_pr30244(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[P:%.*]] = alloca i8, align 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[FLAG:%.*]], label [[IF_THEN:%.*]], label [[IF_ELSE:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.then:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp uge i32 [[BLKSA:%.*]], [[NBLKS:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END_SINK_SPLIT:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.else:
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[FLAG2:%.*]], label [[IF_THEN2:%.*]], label [[IF_END:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.then2:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add i32 [[NBLKS]], [[BLKSB:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = icmp ule i32 [[ADD]], [[BLKSA]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END_SINK_SPLIT]]
; CHECK:       if.end.sink.split:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2_SINK:%.*]] = phi i1 [ [[CMP2]], [[IF_THEN2]] ], [ [[CMP]], [[IF_THEN]] ]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[FROMBOOL3:%.*]] = zext i1 [[CMP2_SINK]] to i8
; CHECK-NEXT:    store i8 [[FROMBOOL3]], ptr [[P]], align 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END]]
; CHECK:       if.end:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 true
entry:
  %p = alloca i8, align 1
  br i1 %flag, label %if.then, label %if.else

if.then:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %blksA, %nblks
  %frombool1 = zext i1 %cmp to i8
  store i8 %frombool1, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

if.else:                                          ; preds = %entry
  br i1 %flag2, label %if.then2, label %if.end

if.then2:                                         ; preds = %if.else
  %add = add i32 %nblks, %blksB
  %cmp2 = icmp ule i32 %add, %blksA
  %frombool3 = zext i1 %cmp2 to i8
  store i8 %frombool3, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

if.end:                                           ; preds = %if.then2, %if.else, %if.then
  ret i1 true
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64:64-i1:8:8-i8:8:8-i16:16:16-i32:32:32-i64:64:64-f32:32:32-f64:64:64-v64:64:64-v128:128:128-a0:0:64-s0:64:64-f80:128:128-n8:16:32:64"
target triple = "x86_64-pc-linux-gnu"

define zeroext i1 @test_pr30244(i1 zeroext %flag, i1 zeroext %flag2, i32 %blksA, i32 %blksB, i32 %nblks) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @test_pr30244(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[P:%.*]] = alloca i8, align 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[FLAG:%.*]], label [[IF_THEN:%.*]], label [[IF_ELSE:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.then:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp uge i32 [[BLKSA:%.*]], [[NBLKS:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END_SINK_SPLIT:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.else:
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[FLAG2:%.*]], label [[IF_THEN2:%.*]], label [[IF_END:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.then2:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add i32 [[NBLKS]], [[BLKSB:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = icmp ule i32 [[ADD]], [[BLKSA]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END_SINK_SPLIT]]
; CHECK:       if.end.sink.split:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2_SINK:%.*]] = phi i1 [ [[CMP2]], [[IF_THEN2]] ], [ [[CMP]], [[IF_THEN]] ]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[FROMBOOL3:%.*]] = zext i1 [[CMP2_SINK]] to i8
; CHECK-NEXT:    store i8 [[FROMBOOL3]], ptr [[P]], align 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END]]
; CHECK:       if.end:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 true
entry:
  %p = alloca i8, align 1
  br i1 %flag, label %if.then, label %if.else

if.then:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %blksA, %nblks
  %frombool1 = zext i1 %cmp to i8
  store i8 %frombool1, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

if.else:                                          ; preds = %entry
  br i1 %flag2, label %if.then2, label %if.end

if.then2:                                         ; preds = %if.else
  %add = add i32 %nblks, %blksB
  %cmp2 = icmp ule i32 %add, %blksA
  %frombool3 = zext i1 %cmp2 to i8
  store i8 %frombool3, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

if.end:                                           ; preds = %if.then2, %if.else, %if.then
  ret i1 true
}
